body:
## Summary

Zero Between the Buried and Me album articles exist in `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` (239 slugs, BTBAM = 0 confirmed this run). `#2935` (Colors/Misdirect 2007+2009) just filed as seo-proposal — the arc needs anchors **before** and **after** it.

**Albums:**
- **Alaska** (2005) — BTBAM breakthrough, expanded sound, 73-min epic prog metal. Slug: `alaska-drum-setup`
- **The Parallax II: Future Sequence** (2012) — 74-min concept album, Grammy territory, Prog Magazine's "album of the decade". Slug: `the-parallax-ii-future-sequence-drum-setup`
- **Coma Ecliptic** (2015) — UK charted, iTunes #1 rock, narrative rock opera. Slug: `coma-ecliptic-drum-setup`

Blake Richardson is an extremely technical drummer (odd time signatures, blast beats + melodic drumming hybrid) — natural cluster with Periphery (Matt Halpern #2934) and DT.

## DB Verification
Run before implementing:
```bash
node -e "const {ALBUM_ARTICLES} = await import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js'); console.log(Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES).filter(s => s.includes('alaska') || s.includes('parallax-ii') || s.includes('coma-ecliptic')));"
```
Expected: empty array. If any slugs found, skip that album.

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 3 entries
- `/public/llms/articles/alaska-drum-setup.md`
- `/public/llms/articles/the-parallax-ii-future-sequence-drum-setup.md`
- `/public/llms/articles/coma-ecliptic-drum-setup.md`

## Template / data shape
```js
'alaska-drum-setup': {
  driverId: 'blake-richardson',
  albumTitle: 'Alaska',
  artist: 'Between the Buried and Me',
  year: 2005,
  genre: 'Progressive Metal',
  dateModified: '2026-06-27',
  // gear: kit from 2005 touring era
}
```
Same pattern for Parallax II (2012) and Coma Ecliptic (2015).

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per article
- Internal links ≥3 (link to /drummer/blake-richardson, /technique/odd-time-signatures, related BTBAM articles once #2935 ships)
- FAQPage schema + Person schema
- LLM file: answer-first paragraph stating what kit Blake used on each album

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets GSC query bucket: progressive metal drummers / BTBAM gear. Blake Richardson has no GSC signal yet — articles are the signal-builder. LLM hook: "What does Blake Richardson play?" / "What is Blake Richardson's drum setup on Colors?" — zero competitors on this niche.

## Verify
- [ ] DB grep returns empty for all 3 slugs
- [ ] /articles/alaska-drum-setup returns 200 with gear content
- [ ] /llms/articles/alaska-drum-setup.md returns 200 with markdown
- [ ] FAQPage schema in JSON-LD
- [ ] Internal link to /drummer/blake-richardson

## Done
All 3 articles live, LLM files present, sitemap auto-updated via ALBUM_ARTICLES dynamic import.
title: SEO batch: Between the Buried and Me — Alaska + Parallax II + Coma Ecliptic drum setup articles (Blake Richardson, 2005/2012/2015 — zero BTBAM articles in DB, ~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
